title: armeria cantabrica subsp. vasconica
intro: Armeria cantabrica subsp. vasconica is a rare, flowering plant species belonging to the family Plumbaginaceae, native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating conditions such as urinary tract infections and joint pain. The health benefits of Armeria cantabrica subsp. vasconica include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant, protecting cells from damage caused by free radicals. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
